answer.en: HTML minification removes comments, unnecessary whitespace, and optional closing tags to reduce file size and improve page load speed.

question.en: Is HTML minification safe for production?

answer.en: Yes, when used carefully. This tool removes comments and excess whitespace. It preserves the HTML structure and all content.

question.en: How much does HTML minification reduce file size?

answer.en: Typically 10–30% reduction depending on how much whitespace and comments the original contains.

question.en: Can I minify CSS and JavaScript inside HTML?

answer.en: This tool minifies the HTML structure. For best results, also minify your CSS and JavaScript separately using the CSS Minifier and JavaScript Minifier tools.
